title: astragalus austriacus
intro: Astragalus austriacus is a perennial plant species within the legume family, native to Europe, which is often confused with Astragalus glycyphyllos. The medicinal properties of Astragalus austriacus are attributed to its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its role in improving cardiovascular health and reducing fatigue. Astragalus austriacus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine to support overall well-being.
